name: iRhythm Holdings, Inc.
summary: iRhythm is a digital healthcare company focused on cardiac monitoring. It develops and provides the Zio patch-based cardiac monitoring system, a wearable biosensor paired with AI-driven analysis software and cloud-based services. The company operates as an independent diagnostic testing facility (IDTF), offering remote cardiac monitoring services to patients and healthcare providers primarily in the U.S., with expanding international presence in the EU, Japan, Switzerland, and the UK.

products.name: Zio patch (iRhythm Services)
products.description: Wearable biosensor-based remote cardiac monitoring service combining a patch device with AI-driven analysis, delivered through IDTF operations.
